validation.invalidEmail: Please provide a valid email address
validation.invalidUuid: This must be a valid UUID
validation.atLeastOne: At least one item is required
validation.invalidUsername: Can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.passwordUppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Must contain at least one number
validation.passwordSpecial: Must contain at least one special character
validation.invalidHexColor: Must be a valid hex color (e.g., #FF5733)
validation.invalidShippingCost: Shipping cost must be a non-negative number up to 999999.99
validation.atLeastOneRate: At least one rate is required

shop.slugMin: Slug must be at least 3 characters
shop.slugFormat: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
shop.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 10 characters

inventory.invalidQuantity: Quantity must be a positive number
inventory.trackingDisabled: Inventory tracking is disabled for this variant
inventory.reservedExceedsQuantity: Cannot reduce stock below reserved quantity
inventory.damagedExceedsAvailable: Cannot mark more as damaged than available stock. Available: {available}, requested: {requested}
inventory.stockOverflow: Stock quantity would exceed maximum allowed value

error.conflictDetails: A record with this information already exists
error.inventoryNotOwned: Inventory does not belong to your shop
error.shopAlreadyVerified: Shop is already verified. Contact admin if you need to update verification documents
error.verificationAlreadyPending: Verification is already pending. Please wait for admin review
error.noChangesInResubmission: No changes detected. Please update at least one document or information before resubmitting
error.plantNotPublishable: Plant cannot be published until required catalog fields are complete
error.stockFieldNotAllowedOnCatalogUpdate: Stock fields cannot be updated via the plant catalog API. Use inventory APIs instead
error.cannotRemoveVariantWithOrders: This variant has order history and was deactivated instead of removed

success.verificationSent: Verification code sent to your email
success.passwordResetRequested: Password reset code sent to your email

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.expiry: This code will expire in 15 minutes.
verification.ignore: If you didn't request this code, please ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.expiry: This code will expire in 15 minutes.
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request this code, please ignore this email.

orderPlacedBuyer.subject: Your Byte Forge order is confirmed
orderPlacedBuyer.body:
Thank you for your order. Total: ৳{totalAmount}. Order numbers:
{orderList}
orderPlacedBuyer.footer: You received this email because you placed an order on Byte Forge.

orderPlacedSeller.subject: New order {orderNumber} — {shopName}
orderPlacedSeller.body: You have a new order {orderNumber} for ৳{total}. Please review and accept it in your seller dashboard.
orderPlacedSeller.footer: You received this email because you are a seller on Byte Forge.

orderAccepted.subject: Order {orderNumber} accepted
orderAccepted.body: Good news! The seller has accepted your order {orderNumber} and is preparing it.
orderAccepted.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge order.

orderPacked.subject: Order {orderNumber} packed
orderPacked.body: Your order {orderNumber} has been packed and is ready to ship.
orderPacked.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge order.

orderShipped.subject: Order {orderNumber} shipped
orderShipped.body: Your order {orderNumber} is on its way. {notes}
orderShipped.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge order.

orderDelivered.subject: Order {orderNumber} delivered
orderDelivered.body: Your order {orderNumber} has been marked as delivered.
orderDelivered.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge order.

orderDeliveryConfirmedSeller.subject: Buyer confirmed delivery — order {orderNumber}
orderDeliveryConfirmedSeller.body: The buyer confirmed delivery for order {orderNumber}. Please confirm COD payment collection to complete the order.
orderDeliveryConfirmedSeller.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge seller account.

orderCompleted.subject: Order {orderNumber} completed
orderCompleted.body: Your order {orderNumber} is now complete. Thank you for shopping with Byte Forge!
orderCompleted.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge order.

orderCancelledByBuyer.subject: Order {orderNumber} cancelled by buyer
orderCancelledByBuyer.body: Order {orderNumber} was cancelled by the buyer. {notes}
orderCancelledByBuyer.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge seller account.

orderCancelledBySeller.subject: Order {orderNumber} cancelled
orderCancelledBySeller.body: We're sorry — order {orderNumber} was cancelled by the seller. {notes}
orderCancelledBySeller.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge order.

shopVerificationSubmitted.subject: Shop verification submitted
shopVerificationSubmitted.body: Your shop verification documents have been submitted. Our team will review them shortly.
shopVerificationSubmitted.footer: You received this email because you submitted shop verification on Byte Forge.

shopVerificationApproved.subject: Your shop is verified!
shopVerificationApproved.body: Your shop has been approved and is now active on Byte Forge. You can start selling to buyers.
shopVerificationApproved.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge seller account.

shopVerificationRejected.subject: Shop verification update
shopVerificationRejected.body: Your shop verification was not approved. Reason: {reason}. Please update your documents and resubmit.
shopVerificationRejected.footer: You received this email because of an update to your Byte Forge seller account.

otp.alreadyUsed: This code has already been used
otp.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please request a new code
